optionName: Nvidia GeForce RTX 3060 Ti Founders Edition
detailedDescription:
Outstanding 1080p and 1440p performance at a great price.
Ampere architecture brings massive efficiency gains over the previous generation.
additionalSpecs:
GPU: GA104 | Architecture: Ampere
CUDA Cores: 4864 | RT Cores: 38 | Tensor Cores: 152
VRAM: 8GB GDDR6 (256-bit bus)
Memory Bandwidth: 448 GB/s
Display Outputs: 3x DisplayPort 1.4a, 1x HDMI 2.1
PCIe: x16 (PCIe 4.0)
Recommended PSU: 600W
API Support: DirectX 12 Ultimate, Vulkan, OpenGL 4.6
